matches.x: 2 Twenty years old was Ahaz when he began to reign, and reigned sixteen years in Jerusalem, and did not that which was right in the sight of the Lord his God, Tike David his father.

Ahaz, king of Judah, (735-715 BC) who made molten images for Baalim and offered child sacrifice and burning incense in the high places (2 Chronicles 28:2-4, 23-25; 2 Kings 16:2-4, 10-16).
